## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and conversion tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO traffic has grown significantly: from 800 clicks/month in August to \~4,500-5,000 clicks/month in December](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Focus shifting to converting traffic: implementing UTM tracking, lead magnets, and gated content](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Team to prioritize ranking for key terms like "shoppable video" (singular/plural) in top 5 positions](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Need to resolve UTM parameter implementation without overwriting original source tracking](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Clicks increased from 800/month (August) to 4,500-5,000/month (December)](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Weekly clicks from GrowthX articles: 0 → 540](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Weekly clicks from existing articles: 200 → 259](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Content refreshes boosted old article performance: 1 click/week → 90 clicks/week](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Producing 10 new articles weekly](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Shifting focus from generating clicks to converting visitors](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Planning Q1 2025 strategy: identify top-performing articles, create gated content/lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Using Airtable as content OS: tracks published, upcoming, and idea-stage content](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Open to input on trendy/seasonal topics from Firework's sales team interactions](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

### Keyword Tracking

  - [Monitoring variations of "shoppable video" and related terms](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Can emphasized focus on 3 specific keywords shared in July](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Team to provide week-over-week tracking for priority keywords](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)

### Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)

  - [Uptick in conversions noted, but source tracking needed](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Discussion on implementing UTM parameters in blog widgets without overwriting original source](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Potential solution: use unused UTM fields (e.g., UTM\_name) to avoid conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)

### Meeting Structure

  - [Winnie suggested sending performance data before meetings to focus more on strategy discussions](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [Next meeting scheduled for January 8th due to holiday break](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Add Winnie to Notion doc and Airtable for content strategy access](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [Investigate unused UTM fields for blog widget tracking implementation](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Schedule discussion between Winnie, Cameron, Adam, and Adi on UTM tracking solution](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Continue focus on ranking for priority keywords like "shoppable video"](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Prepare Q1 2025 strategy for gated content and lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Share meeting notes with Winnie for catch-up](https://fathom.video/share/ehyi9XSnxZxcksjP6xs83w1iH3hNo_u2?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
